description:
Parent epic: V3 E12: Workflows

Source task 4/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify functions, tools, agents, imported agents, context, inputs, outputs,
  and failure handling.

Epic closure criteria:
- workflows are deterministic and testable without model calls
- workflow-as-action execution is documented and verified

comments.text: Expanded workflow coverage for keyword input normalization, string-key context refs, action-step input validation, and documented the existing coverage across action/function/agent/imported-agent steps and normalized failures.

title: E12: Verify functions, tools, agents, imported agents, context, inputs, outputs, and...
